seoTitle: Torrens Island vs Torrens Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Torrens Island and Torrens Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Torrens Island vs Torrens Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Torrens Island and Torrens Park.
heading: Torrens Island vs Torrens Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Torrens Island, South Australia and Torrens Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Torrens Island has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Torrens Park (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Torrens Island or Torrens Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Torrens Island has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Torrens Park scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Torrens Island scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Torrens Park scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Torrens Island or Torrens Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Torrens Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
